completeWithErrors.description: Specifies whether file processing should complete with errors. False means any error in output file processing will result in no actions being committed. True means that if row-level errors occur, then failing rows and their errors will be saved to errorFile, and actions from successful rows will be committed.

fileId.description: The ID of a blob link or the API ID of a file to process.

folderId.description: The API ID of the folder to set for the automation output file. Folder items created by the correpsonding output processor will be created in this folder.

locationId.description: The API ID of the location to set for the automation output file. Storable items created by the correpsonding output processor will be created at this location.

timezone.description: The timezone to set for the automation output file. Used as the timezone for the timestamp fields if not set in the timestamp.
